# Siplinx AI

> Siplinx AI is a private, offline desktop app for AI-powered meeting notes. It transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items from meetings — entirely on-device using a local LLM and local speech-to-text. No audio, transcripts, or data ever leave your device.

Siplinx AI works with Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Unlike cloud-based competitors (Granola, Fireflies.ai, Otter.ai, Fathom, tl;dv), Siplinx AI processes everything locally — making it the choice for professionals who handle confidential conversations. The app is available in English and Russian.

Key differentiators:
- 100% offline — works without internet after setup
- Local LLM + local STT (speech-to-text) — no third-party AI APIs
- No subscription data risk — your meeting content never touches external servers
- GDPR and HIPAA-friendly by design
- Supports multi-speaker diarization (identifies who said what)

## Product

- [Home](https://siplinx.com/): Overview of features, use cases, and value proposition
- [Pricing](https://siplinx.com/pricing/): Plans and pricing for Siplinx AI
- [Download](https://siplinx.com/download/): Download the desktop app for Mac and Windows
- [About](https://siplinx.com/about/): Company background and mission
- [Security](https://siplinx.com/security/): Technical details on how data stays on-device

## Content

- [Blog](https://siplinx.com/blog/): Articles on AI privacy, local LLMs, meeting productivity, and alternatives to cloud-based tools
- [Authors](https://siplinx.com/authors/): Team members and advisors who write for Siplinx AI

- [Privacy Policy](https://siplinx.com/privacy/): How Siplinx AI handles (or rather, doesn't collect) user data
